name: Mushroom and Barley Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, bring beef broth to boiling.
2. Stir in barley, onion, garlic, basil, Worcestershire sauce, and pepper. Cover and simmer about 10 minutes or until barley is nearly tender.
3. Stir in mushrooms and carrot. Simmer, covered, for 5 more minutes.
4. Meanwhile, in a small bowl combine cornstarch and water; stir into saucepan.
5. Cook and stir 2 more minutes. Sprinkle with parsley.
